meta.title: How To Make $3500 Per Month Re-uploading YouTube videos with AI
meta.description:
How To Make $3500 Per month Re-uploading YouTube videos with AI
Try OpusClip for Free 👉 https://bit.ly/49b8WcU

Did you know that many other Youtube Creators are making money by reuploading their old content? In this video I show you the complete step by step tutorial on how to make money by reuploading youtube videos with ai. 
This is essentially AI YouTube Automation

I'm currently looking into this myself to create a second channel and reupload my content. Because if you don't apply this strategy you're missing out on more views, subscribers and money. 

The Tool that I used for this is called Opus Clip, it's an AI video clipping tool that can clip 9:16 and 16:9 videos, which is perfect for repurposing your content. 

Here's an entire tutorial on Opus clip
▶ https://youtu.be/unKe7boAlW0
